name: Echinacea Echinacea purpurea
summary: Echinacea purpurea is most studied for shortening the duration and easing symptoms of upper respiratory infections, with immune-modulating effects attributed to its alkamide and caffeic-acid-derivative content.
description: Echinacea purpurea is most studied for shortening the duration and easing symptoms of upper respiratory infections, with immune-modulating effects attributed to its alkamide and caffeic-acid-derivative content.
safetyNotes: Generally safe short-term; allergic reactions possible (Asteraceae family)
dosage: Extracts (variable alkylamide/cichoric acid content): 300-1000 mg/day equivalent; significant variability by species and preparation
typical_dosage: Extracts (variable alkylamide/cichoric acid content): 300-1000 mg/day equivalent; significant variability by species and preparation
